who: procurement officers at restaurants processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement officers at restaurants processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate invoice reconciliation leading to payment delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement help
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement officers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry for invoice data and notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
